_comment: Template for a World ID SIMULATOR proof (no orb/passport needed). Copy to worldid_proof.json, fill from the IDKit/simulator response, then run: PROOF_FIXTURE=test/fixtures/worldid_proof.json FORK=true forge test --match-test test_RealProof_Replay -vvv. appId+action MUST match what you generated the proof with; signal MUST be the same address you passed to IDKit.
